message:
test(cli): add spawn command test coverage

Adds unit tests for the spawn command to validate:
- Session name normalization and validation
- Agent type parsing from flags
- Working directory resolution
- Tmux session creation parameters
- Error handling for invalid configurations

These tests complement the existing integration tests by providing
fast, isolated verification of spawn command logic without requiring
a running tmux server.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
